display.purpose: Masthead title and GameCompletion headline only. Never applied to body or UI text.

headline.purpose: Article title — the name of the news content being typed.

body.purpose: Typing content and editorial copy. Times New Roman at natural measure, max ~70ch.

label.purpose: All functional text: WPM/accuracy stats, button labels, author attribution, toast copy.

shadows.name: key-press
shadows.purpose: Hover imprint for secondary buttons. Hard, tight, structural.

shadows.name: key-press-soft
shadows.purpose: Hover imprint for primary (ink-filled) buttons. Half-opacity prevents double-border read against dark fill.

shadows.name: surface-imprint
shadows.purpose: Elevated surface shadow for modal and toast. Heavier offset signals a surface lifted off the page.

motion.name: cursor-blink
motion.purpose: Typing surface cursor. Binary on/off — never faded. Pause under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: slide-in
motion.keyframes: from { transform: translateX(100%); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; }
motion.purpose: Toast entrance from the right edge.

motion.name: slide-out
motion.keyframes: from { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } to { transform: translateX(100%); opacity: 0; }
motion.purpose: Toast exit on dismiss or expiry.

breakpoints.name: content-max
breakpoints.purpose: Maximum width of the main content article (max-w-5xl). Content is centered beyond this.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-width ink-filled action button. Used for Share Result and primary commitment actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background-color: #0f0e0c; color: #faf8f4; border: 2px solid #0f0e0c; border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s ease-out; width: 100%; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f0e0c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Full-width paper-background button. Used for Play Again, focus-prompt, and secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background-color: #faf8f4; color: #0f0e0c; border: 2px solid #0f0e0c; border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s ease-out; width: 100%; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #f5f3ef; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px 0px #0f0e0c; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; background-color: #faf8f4; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f0e0c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Typing Letter States
components.description: The signature component. Characters rendered with four mutually exclusive states: typed-correct, typed-incorrect, current-cursor (blinking), and untyped.
components.html: The qxick brown
components.css: .ds-typing-demo { font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.625; background-color: #faf8f4; padding: 16px; } .ds-letter { display: inline; } .ds-letter--typed { color: #0f0e0c; } .ds-letter--untyped { color: #d4d2cd; } .ds-letter--incorrect { background-color: #f87171; color: #faf8f4; } .ds-letter--current { background-color: #0f0e0c; color: #faf8f4; animation: ds-blink 1s step-end infinite; } @keyframes ds-blink { 0%,49% { background-color: #0f0e0c; color: #faf8f4; } 50%,100% { background-color: transparent; color: #d4d2cd; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-letter--current { animation: none; background-color: #0f0e0c; color: #faf8f4; } }

components.name: Toast
components.description: AFK notification. Slides in from the right, auto-dismisses after 5s. Surface-imprint shadow, paper background, ink border.
components.html: AFK DetectedWPM has been readjusted to your last active typing speed.
components.css: .ds-toast { background-color: #faf8f4; border: 2px solid #0f0e0c; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #0f0e0c; width: 320px; animation: ds-slide-in 0.3s ease-out; } .ds-toast-content { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-toast-title { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f0e0c; } .ds-toast-body { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #6e6e6e; } @keyframes ds-slide-in { from { transform: translateX(100%); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-toast { animation: none; } }

components.name: Modal Surface
components.description: Game completion overlay. The one surface that lifts off the page. Surface-imprint shadow (4x4), paper background, ink border. Completion headline uses Display face as the one UI exception beside the masthead.
components.html:
Congratulations!

87WPM
94%Accuracy
12Errors
components.css: .ds-modal-overlay { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 24px; background-color: rgba(15,14,12,0.5); } .ds-modal { background-color: #faf8f4; border: 2px solid #0f0e0c; border-radius: 8px; padding: 32px; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #0f0e0c; text-align: center; width: 100%; max-width: 448px; } .ds-modal-title { font-family: 'Manufacturing Consent', cursive; font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1; color: #0f0e0c; margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-stat-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-stat-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f0e0c; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6e6e6e; }

components.name: Masthead
components.description: The newspaper header. Display-type title with 1px rule, then a meta row (username / date / live stats) with a 2px rule. Never a toolbar — always a masthead.
components.html:
The Typewriter Times

amoresjanTHURSDAY, MAY 15, 202587 WPM | 94%
components.css: .ds-masthead { margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-masthead-title { font-family: 'Manufacturing Consent', cursive; font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #0f0e0c; padding-bottom: 16px; color: #0f0e0c; } .ds-masthead-meta { margin-top: 4px; display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-bottom: 2px solid #0f0e0c; padding-bottom: 4px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #0f0e0c; } .ds-masthead-byline { width: 192px; } .ds-masthead-date { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.025em; } .ds-masthead-stats { width: 192px; text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

narrative.overview:
A broadsheet printed before dawn, folded twice, placed on a cafe table still slightly cool from the press. The reader straightens it, finds the article, and begins. That is the physical scene this interface inhabits. Everything in this design system serves that moment: the weight of the masthead, the column of editorial type, the mechanical precision of keys pressed and letters committed.

This is not a typing app that looks like a newspaper. It is a newspaper that happens to be typed. The distinction matters: design decisions flow from print-production logic, not screen-design convention. The neobrutalist component layer is the press hall made literal. Elements behave like physical type blocks: flat at rest, pressing into the page when depressed, returning when released.

This system explicitly refuses: the gamer-coded typing-test aesthetic (Monkeytype/Typeracer dark mode, neon accents, HUD energy); the SaaS dashboard pattern (cards, progress rings, metric widgets); Wordle-style flat pastels; the characterless Figma/Notion neutral.
keyCharacteristics: Print-black and newsprint-white as the total chromatic vocabulary, plus one error red
Three typeface registers that never overlap: blackletter masthead / serif editorial / sans-serif UI
Neobrutalism as press-hall material language: hard offset shadows, 2px ink borders, no ornament
The cursor blink is the only animation on the typing surface; everything else is still
Stats recede into the masthead; the editorial copy is the stage

rules.name: The One Ink Rule
rules.body: Ink (#0f0e0c) is used at full strength or not at all. No opacity tricks, no tinted decorative variants. Press-red is the sole chromatic signal, and it means one thing: wrong.

rules.name: The No-New-Hues Rule
rules.body: Never introduce a second accent color. No blue for links, no green for success, no amber for warnings. State and meaning are expressed through weight, position, and the existing vocabulary.

rules.name: The Two-Register Rule
rules.body: Manufacturing Consent is the masthead face. Never apply it to buttons, sub-headings, modal titles, or UI text. The moment it escapes the masthead, the newspaper illusion fractures.

rules.name: The Stats Rule
rules.body: Live statistics are always set in label type (system-ui, 0.875rem, tabular-nums). Never bump them into editorial or display style.

rules.name: The Flat-First Rule
rules.body: Elements are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation). Never shadow a static surface.

rules.name: The Press-Key Rule
rules.body: Hard-offset imprints only. 2x2 for interactive, 4x4 for elevated surfaces. No blur. No spread. No ambient glow. If it looks like a drop shadow, redo it.

rules.name: The Typing Surface Rule
rules.body: The editorial field is untouchable. No overlapping chrome, no decorative borders, no background tinting of the content area. The text and the cursor are the only things that live on this surface.

dos: Do use hard-offset solid shadows (2px 2px 0px 0px #0f0e0c or 4px 4px 0px 0px #0f0e0c). No blur. No spread.
Do keep the typing surface free of any overlapping UI chrome.
Do use Manufacturing Consent exclusively for the masthead title and GameCompletion headline.
Do use system-sans for all functional text: stats, button labels, toast copy, attribution.
Do keep Press-red (#f87171) as the sole chromatic accent, and only for typing errors.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for cursor blink and toast slide animations.
Do use tabular-nums on all live numerical displays.
Do use the Ink and Paper tokens (#0f0e0c, #faf8f4) rather than Tailwind's pure black/white.
donts: Don't use neon accents, dark backgrounds, or any gamer-coded aesthetic.
Don't introduce card grids, progress rings, metric widgets, or SaaS dashboard patterns.
Don't use flat pastels of any hue. Saturated non-red color fractures the newspaper illusion.
Don't use a characterless beige-neutral system (the Figma/Notion register).
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill).
Don't use backdrop-filter blur on modal surfaces or decorative cards.
Don't blur, spread, or ambient-glow any shadow. If it has a blur radius, it is wrong.
Don't apply Manufacturing Consent outside the masthead and completion headline.
Don't introduce a second accent color for any reason.
